title: Operations Analyst
description: GE Aerospace is seeking an Operations Analyst for our Kansas City Manufacturing facility. You will optimize production schedules, manage component inventory, and ensure efficient workflow across our advanced aerospace engine manufacturing operations. This role requires meticulous process management and the ability to work in a highly regulated defense contracting environment where precision and accountability are non-negotiable.
responsibilities: Analyze production schedules and identify bottlenecks that impact delivery timelines
Monitor inventory levels across manufacturing zones and recommend reordering based on production forecasts
Prepare daily shift reports documenting production metrics, quality incidents, and workforce utilization
Coordinate with quality assurance teams on defect tracking and corrective action closure rates
Maintain compliance documentation required for ITAR and security clearance protocols
Support lean manufacturing initiatives by mapping workflows and identifying waste reduction opportunities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Industrial Engineering, Operations Management, or related discipline
certifications: Secret-level security clearance or ability to obtain (required)

benefits: Comprehensive health benefits with dependent coverage
Defined benefit pension plan for long-term retirement security
On-site fitness center and wellness programs
Paid parental leave and adoption assistance
